result.full_text: thanks for calling chime one moment while we locate an account with your phone number if you have an account with chime press one if you are interested in joining chime or want more info on product and services press two to report fraudulent or unauthorized account activity press three to verify a chime please enter the phone number associated with your account starting with the area code to verify your identity please enter the last four digits of your social security number now please enter the last four digits of your active card thank you press seven at any time for your account balance for the status of a direct deposit press one to activate your card press two to update your pin press three to request a new card or report your card lost or stolen press four to file or receive the status of a dispute press five for help updating your account information or logging in press six to hear your account balance press seven for assistance with a different chime product or feature press eight to verbally describe your issue press nine to hear these options again press star for questions about your savings account or automatic savings feature press one if you have a question about your checking account press two if you need help with our spot me or pay any one feature press three to learn more about my pay press four for help with our rewards programs including referrals and cash bonuses press five if you have questions about filing your taxes or your tax return press six to hear these options again press star to go to the main menu press eight to learn about spot me and how to enroll press one if spot me is enabled on your account and you're experiencing an issue press two if you are calling about recent changes to your spot me feature press three to learn about the benefits of pay anyone and how it works press four if you are trying to cancel or pay anyone transfer press five if you are experiencing issues with pay anyone press six to hear these options again press star to go to the main menu press eight pay anyone is the fastest way to send money to your coworkers friends and family to use this free feature open the chime app and tap on the pay anyone tab if you transfer money to a friend with a chime account the money will be available instantly if you transfer money to a friend who is not yet a chime member the recipient will receive an invitation to join chime your friend will have fourteen days to enroll and be approved for a chime checking account if the recipient doesn't claim your transfer within fourteen days the funds will be sent back to your account automatically press star to repeat this message press eight to go to the main menu to end this call please hang up good bye hi i have a question about pay anyone what's the most yeah i just wanted to ask what's the most money i can send to someone in a day using pay anyone i need to pay my landlord eight hundred dollars for rent and i want to make sure i can do it all at once

prompt_outputs.saa: [Speaker 1]: Thanks for calling Chime. One moment while we locate an account with your phone number. If you have an account with Chime, press 1. If you are interested in joining Chime or want more info on product and services, press 2. To report fraudulent or unauthorized account activity, press 3. To verify a Chime please enter the phone number associated with your account starting with the area code. To verify your identity, please enter the last four digits of your social security number. Now please enter the last four digits of your active card. Thank you. Press 7 at any time for your account balance. For the status of a direct deposit, press 1. To activate your card, press 2. To update your pin, press 3. To request a new card or report your card lost or stolen, press 4. To file or receive the status of a dispute, press 5. For help updating your account information or logging in, press 6. To hear your account balance, press 7. For assistance with a different Chime product or feature, press 8. To verbally describe your issue, press 9. To hear these options again, press 3. For questions about your savings account or automatic savings feature, press 1. If you have a question about your checking account, press 2. If you need help with our SpotMe or PayAnyOne feature, press 3. To learn more about myPay, press 4. For help with our rewards programs, including referrals and cash bonuses, press 5. If you have questions about filing your taxes or your tax return, press 6. To hear these options again, press 3. To go to the main menu, press 8. To learn about SpotMe and how to enroll, press 1. If SpotMe is enabled on your account and you're experiencing an issue, press 2. If you are calling about recent changes to your SpotMe feature, press 3. To learn about the benefits of PayAnyOne and how it works, press 4. If you are trying to cancel or pay any one transfer, press 5. If you are experiencing issues with PayAnyOne, press 6. To hear these options again, press 3. To go to the main menu, press 8. To learn about the benefits of PayAnyOne, press 1. If the recipient doesn't claim your transfer within 14 days, the funds will be sent back to your account automatically. Press 3 to repeat this message. Press 8 to go to the main menu. To end this call, please hang up. Press 3 to repeat this message. Press 8 to go to the main menu. To end this call, please hang up. Goodbye. Hi, I have a question about PayAnyOne. What's the most yeah, I just wanted to ask what's the most money I can send to someone in a day using PayAnyOne? I need to pay my landlord $800 for rent and I want to make sure I can do it all at once.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: thanks for calling chime one moment while we locate an account with your phone number if you have an account with chime press one if you are interested in joining chime or want more info on product and services press two to report fraudulent or unauthorized account activity press three to verify a chime please enter the phone number associated with your account starting with the area code to verify your identity please enter the last four digits of your social security number now please enter the last four digits of your active card thank you press seven at any time for your account balance for the status of a direct deposit press one to activate your card press two to update your pin press three to request a new card or report your card lost or stolen press four to file or receive the status of a dispute press five for help updating your account information or logging in press six to hear your account balance press seven for assistance with a different chime product or feature press eight to verbally describe your issue press nine to hear these options again press star

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: for questions about your savings account or automatic savings feature press one if you have a question about your checking account press two if you need help with our spot me or pay any one feature press three to learn more about my pay press four for help with our rewards programs including referrals and cash bonuses press five if you have questions about filing your taxes or your tax return press six to hear these options again press star to go to the main menu press eight

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: to learn about spot me and how to enroll press one if spot me is enabled on your account and you're experiencing an issue press two if you are calling about recent changes to your spot me feature press three to learn about the benefits of pay anyone and how it works press four if you are trying to cancel or pay anyone transfer press five if you are experiencing issues with pay anyone press six to hear these options again press star to go to the main menu press eight

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: pay anyone is the fastest way to send money to your coworkers friends and family to use this free feature open the chime app and tap on the pay anyone tab if you transfer money to a friend with a chime account the money will be available instantly if you transfer money to a friend who is not yet a chime member the recipient will receive an invitation to join chime your friend will have fourteen days to enroll and be approved for a chime checking account if the recipient doesn't claim your transfer within fourteen days the funds will be sent back to your account automatically press star to repeat this message press eight to go to the main menu to end this call please hang up

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: i have a question about pay anyone what's the most yeah i just wanted to ask what's the most money i can send to someone in a day using pay anyone i need to pay my landlord eight hundred dollars for rent and i want to make sure i can do it all at once
